author: DominicVainMod
content:
Holosim - Free to Play SAGE Labs

Surprise. We're launching the public test phase of Holosim, the Free to Play version of SAGE Labs.

Holosim delivers a zero-barrier Star Atlas experience and gives us a space to test exciting new features. You can now try out the following in Holosim:
Combat — Engage in battles for the first time. Ships are permanently destroyed for now.,SAGE — Your personal AI assistant trained to help you with all things Star Atlas.,Route Manager — Automation tools to streamline your operations.,Tutorial System — Learn the ropes faster than ever.,Questing System — Take on new challenges and progress through missions.,
 | Play now: https://holosim.staratlas.com/

@everyone
